item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-036","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did not blindly produce another prompt version. It explicitly rejected feeling-based iteration as insufficient, asked for the current/previous prompt plus task and good/bad examples, and reframed the next step around observable, comparable acceptance criteria. This establishes a measurable validation surface before further iteration, matching the positive wakeup expectation."}
